response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with a focus on technical innovation and leadership, and experience with AI-related technologies.
strengths: Strong experience in software development across multiple platforms
Proven leadership and innovation in technical projects
Experience with AI-related technologies and cloud platforms
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy or cloud product development
Limited experience in management or director-level roles
Not all experience is directly related to the job description
